creator: glewis@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

Steve, I can't reproduce these problems.  I've got gnuplot installed and I 
don't have any of these files.  Pointyhat notes no packing list problems 
either: 

http://pointyhat.freebsd.org/errorlogs/i386-8-full-logs/gnuplot-4.4.4_1.log 

So, I have to suspect that you may have some non-standard options turned on 
that cause these files to be installed.  Can you please tell me if you have 
either the THINSPLINES or GRIDBOX options configured on?
